Body: Dear Vivekanand Balakrishnan  Thank you very much for your interest in my services. I truly appreciate it!  Before we move forward, I would like to share a few important points for your consideration:  Collaboration: Resume writing is a collaborative process, and I believe that working closely together will yield the best results.  Professional Services: Please note that my services are professional and come with an associated fee. This allows me to dedicate the necessary time and effort to reviewing and writing your resume. My rate is USD 4, which includes not only resume refinement but also LinkedIn optimization, a bonus cover letter, and interview tips.  Alternative Resources: If you prefer not to use the paid service, I encourage you to check out my TikTok videos @habillutfii, where you can find helpful content available for free.  Please let me know if these terms are agreeable to you.  Warm regards, Habil

Hi Dear,  I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to reach out and offer my professional resume revision services to help elevate your LinkedIn profile and traditional resume, making them more compelling and impactful for your job search and career growth.  With extensive experience as a resume writer, I specialize in crafting resumes and LinkedIn profiles that showcase your key skills, accomplishments, and career progression.  Here’s how I can assist:  Consultation and Review: We’ll discuss your goals, review your current resume and LinkedIn profile, and gather additional information to ensure your documents reflect your unique career journey.  Resume Revision: I’ll update your resume to highlight recent roles and key achievements, optimizing it for applicant tracking systems (ATS) for better visibility.  LinkedIn Profile Optimization: Your LinkedIn profile will be aligned with your updated resume, including a well-crafted summary and searchability improvements.  Feedback and Finalization: I’ll incorporate your feedback, make any necessary adjustments, and finalize your resume and LinkedIn profile.  Could you let me know your budget for this service? This will allow me to tailor my proposal to fit your needs.  Once you confirm, we can schedule a consultation and begin the process. Thank you for considering my services—I look forward to helping you advance your career.  Best regards, Shah Mohammed
